commit_scope: Promote GET /api/gates/main-head to a BML-authored Go kernel route with generic native external HTTP carrier support

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/tests/source-language-route-class-template-band.fk
local_validation.summary: GET /api/gates/main-head is now selected by the Go native front door and handled by BML. The Go kernel added a generic http_get carrier primitive returning a Form dict; BML composes GitHub headers, timeout, URL, response status handling, volatile SHA cache CRUD, Form JSON parsing, and Form JSON response emission. The BML source compiler now accepts top-level == expressions and lowers them to value_eq, so the route can express cache/token/sha comparisons in high grammar instead of str_eq calls. The real local curl returned 200 with X-Form-Router=native-kernel-go and body sha=386fed3dd860696707dc1fbac9905bfe7a24f175.

ci_validation.reason: No commit, push, or PR was created in this turn.

deploy_validation.reason: No production deploy was performed. The route was proven through the local Go native front door against the live GitHub API.

phase_gate.reason: Local route proof passed, but CI and deploy validation remain pending until this work is committed and shipped.

evidence_refs: Go route test TestGatesMainHeadRouteFetchesExternalHTTPInBML proves /api/gates/main-head calls an httptest GitHub-compatible endpoint via http_get, sends Accept/X-GitHub-Api-Version/User-Agent/Authorization headers, returns 200, and emits repo/branch/sha JSON with X-Form-Router=native-kernel-go.

Real local curl through the Go listener returned HTTP/1.1 200 OK, X-Form-Route-Where: route:gates-main-head pattern:/api/gates/main-head request:/api/gates/main-head, X-Form-Router: native-kernel-go, and body {"repo":"seeker71/Coherence-Network","branch":"main","sha":"386fed3dd860696707dc1fbac9905bfe7a24f175"}.
source-language-route-class-template-band now proves BML == lowers to value_eq and executes across kernels; validate.sh reports verdict 1049665 with 1 ok, 0 divergent.
native_route_goal_loop /loop --source api now reports bml_routes=30, goal_native_share=0.85, native_executable_share=0.864, and next gap GET /api/automation/usage/readiness.
The kernel carrier does not parse or emit JSON; JSON parsing and response emission for this route stay in deploy/front-door/api.bml.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The main-head release gate can enter through the Go native front door and execute as BML using generic external HTTP bytes plus Form JSON semantics, removing this measured route from the Python-fanout promotion queue.
test_flows: Deterministic httptest-backed Go route test validates request headers, response shaping, and native route decision headers.
Real local Go listener curl resolves the live seeker71/Coherence-Network main branch SHA from GitHub and returns it through Form JSON.
